notes: Use only with your legitimate portal access.
Each download URL should already be the final authenticated file endpoint or a stable export endpoint you are allowed to use.
The downloader does not create accounts or bypass CAPTCHAs.

jobs.description: GFZ IGETS superconducting gravimeter download job via official SFTP access.
notes: Use your legitimate IGETS/GFZ SFTP credentials.
Set L1A_SFTP_USERNAME and L1A_SFTP_PASSWORD, or pass --ssh-key for key-based auth.

jobs.description: GFZ IGETS superconducting gravimeter download job for raw or highest-available time series files.
notes: Log in manually with your real IGETS account.
If the final file request only works inside a browser session, use --selenium so the script can reuse that session.

jobs.description: INTERMAGNET authenticated or semi-authenticated 1-second geomagnetic data download job.
notes: Use a real observatory or member-approved access path.
Point each URL at the exact file or export endpoint you can lawfully access.

jobs.description: SuperMAG export job using your legitimate account or API-style user access.
notes: If you have a user ID or token-like export parameter instead of a browser session, place that directly in the final URL.
For large exports, break requests into smaller windows to avoid portal timeouts.
